exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 112 Current browser version is 132.0.6834.159 with binary path /usr/bin/google-chrome Host info: host: 'ritvikchouhan77', ip: '192.168.13.128' Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '5.3.0-1023-aws', java.version: '11.0.19' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--headless, --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage, --disable-gpu, --window-size=1920,1080], binary: /usr/bin/google-chrome, extensions: []}}]}]
